segments.text: Today, long time back, Christ was born.
You all know the story of His birth and
Of All The Sufferings He Had To Go Through
He Is One Who Has Given Us A Model Of Our Sahaja Yoga
For He Didn't Live for Himself In No Way
But he lived for others, working out the Agnya Chakra.
You may be divine you maybe very powerful
but this world is so cruel that they don't understand spirituality
They do not understand spiritual greatness
Not only there are many factors which attack spirituality
they have always done it. Every saint has suffered a lot, but I think Christ has suffered the most
as you know He was endowed with all the powers of Shri Ganesha
As he's The reincarnation Of Shri Ganesh
The first of them was his innocence, he was the eternal child we should say.
That you couldn't understand the cruelty and hypocrisy
Of this stupid world still if
You understood what can do about it but with great courage
He took birth in a country where people had no idea
I have read a book about him saying that he came to Kashmir, we…he met one of my forefathers
Shalivana.
It's very interesting because it is all in Sanskrit and the writer perhaps did not
know Sanskrit so He has given everything in Sanskrit language which was not very
I am sure, to the Western people.
Thank God he didn't know Sanskrit otherwise it would have been very dangerous!
It's written in that
That He asked Christ why you've come into India?
So said this is my country
and thats where i'm coming
Where people respect spirituality
but live among those who do not understand spirituality at all
His conversation with them was very, very interesting because Shalivana said that there
is more reason you should go back to your country and teach them Nirmala Tattvam.
That's the principle of purification went back after three-and half years he was
I personally think the big difference between
Western execution and Indian is that in
The West killing a very great profession with
The slightest pretext they kill people. Anybody who
Is a saint was killed or they call him a madcap
This is the best way to avoid spirituality.
While in India if a saint says anything, then he's not challenged – never!
But they believe it because He' s a Saint and has much higher personality than we are
though there were very nasty people around
and they tortured them, but as a whole the public the people respected.
If there are false gurus normally
They don't stay in this country because
Because know that will be found out
Also their so money oriented
That go to America or some foreign countries
And settle down here
To make money
This is one of signs one should say
This may be one of the reasons why Christ was born in a very,
ordinary family.
He had no proper bed to sleep as child also
It is all described where he slept
how his mother and father lived
In place were there were cows
and cows. It was to show that spirituality doesn't need any luxury, doesn' tneed
any pomp or show it is a power within ,it's a glow and light within which shows automatically
You don't have to do anything to show it off.
Such a person doesn' t hae any sense of money and other things as possessions, he was bothered
about people who were suffering physically even the lepers ,and He tried to cure them
He tried to help so many people who were sick physically, because at that time there
was no hospitals –no doctors.
So his attention is drawn on the people suffering physically and also mentally he tries
to prepare them. There are so many beautiful servants on the Mount." In a way, that time
people were not materialistic – they listened to Him! We can't say how many understood
him… It's very important if you're an unrealized soul then it is difficult
To understand spirituality, the one who is talking about spirituality and
The One Who's listening to you both of them have
Minimum of realization. So from his beautiful life that I see
We had to learn unless or until we are realized so
We will be torturing the Spirit of Christ.
You have seen it's happening, all those who talk about Christ – he has said very clearly
that He'll call Me Christ-Christ and I won't recognize Him."
Very clearly yes they did!
I don't know why they didn't remove it from the Bible.
It means those who will talk and preach,
And dress up to show off that their spiritual in
The name of Christ he would not recognize them
Is as simple is this time now when
It's the last judgment.
He is going to judge the whole world on the basis of spirituality, which means vibrations
His judgement has already started I have seen it you can see in so many countries things
are just disappearing all their ego ,all there aggressiveness
All their cruelties are being challenged and those who did wrong in the war also,
Are taken to task.
So In The History Also Those Who Have Done Wrong To Any Community
to any people, they all will be taken into task.
They had no business of being aggressive on the people and torturing them."
This is what Shri Ganesha's principle acting through Sahaja Yoga.
Christ didn't say that, but He did say there will be last judgment.
On one side he was very kind and compassionate on the other
side it was really Shri Ganesha because
He took a hunter to hit the people who were selling things in the temple.
You cannot have business, you can't do anything in the name of religion!
What big thing it is understand?
But Christians didn' t follow that they did not I don''t know where had gone as
We have Mahatma Gandhi who talked of spirituality and nothing else, Adhyatm all the time.
But his successors came put him somewhere with this spirituality
And started a new world
New ideas
and a new style of life.
Those who are supposed to be his followers
now wanting many pubs
also all kinds things, can you imagine?
This Congress was started by Mahatma Gandhi
And the congress fellows
where they going lead
The beauty in this country is
the treasure of this country is spirituality
Instead of taking to spirituality, where are they going?
They may not be Christians but the respect Christ.
The respect Bible – I must tell you is a fact people don't know
—they're no Christians means in that sense
there's no baptised
But their respect
because
They understand that there was so much of spirituality about Christ.
He was the personification of spirituality, thus
is beauty for Indians if somebody is a Hindu or Muslim makes no difference
There were many Muslims who where saints and Sufis in India
they are all respected by everyone whether they're Muslims
So for Christ, nobody has any objection at all.
On the contrary you saw yesterday how they were happy about Him because
They are realized souls but even if
In this country Christ is very much respected
How can they scrutinize the life of Christ?
How can they judge Him, and how can make vulgar films about it?
This – They cannot bear because the respect that
for spirituality exists very much more than it exists outside.
Because in name of Christ people have done such a lot wrong
Now such a lot of killing has been done, all kinds
wrong things have been accepted.
With the oldies one doesn't understand how they
have judged Christ for example what I know in England
I saw was shocked that if somebody dies
They drink ,if someone is born
they drink. Drinking is the only way to have relationships, how can you drink? I asked
them he said why Christ created wine as a man in a wedding that was not wine but just
the juice of their grapes that they grew there, we call it Drakshasa in our language.
How can be wine? It has to be fermented and rotten – how
So this is biggest dharma to drink.
But in India we know, though nobody has said anything against drinking but
We know that drinking
Is a sinful thing
You see it every day
Everybody knows
That if you drink
you become absolutely out of your mind.
There's nothing to be said on a religious platform,
but everybody knows that what is drinking
– not just people abroad who don't know
they also do know
But somehow it has became a fashion
Even in our country
It had now been introduced
I dunno how after independence
People have started drinking
Every party they drink, also in the name of Christ on Christmas Day is such an insult
to His beautiful holy life.
So when They came onto this earth perhaps all their powers of holiness were destroyed
The very good thing about Indians Is that at least they respect, they respect a holy
That is something good about them, and they know what is holiness.
Now of course there are becoming very modern
an Americanized but still
They Know What Is Wrong
What should not be done
With Sahaja Yoga now I am happy to say
that the foreign sahajogis also have become very beautiful
I am surprised, because in their culture there is no spirituality.
But i don't know how they left all that nonsense and have come out like lotuses beautifully
with such beautiful fragrance of spirituality?
This something a miracle!
Everybody says Mother we can not believe it.
How could this happen?
How did you manage this, I would say is the blessing of Christ.
They saw how people are working out in
The Name Of Christ
In a very degraded manner
And they developed
A kind
Awareness
That definitely something wrong with us
This Is not Christ
This is not His holy life they are depicting, there's something else.
And that how I think in the West
There' s a greater urge
Greater ascending force
Yesterday somebody came and told Me
Mother! There no collective meditation
i was very happy to hear that
What most important is meditation in Sahaja Yoga
No doubt about it, but the foreigners do meditation much more than Indians too – very surprising.
And foreign men and women are really highly equipped I must say as far spirituality is
concerned especially Russians!
I was surprised that in America they told Me,
Mother these Americans are not Sahaja Yogis.
And said why?
They don't have the respect for you
and do not meditate
those who did not mediate
Are not sahajogies
So i said I agree
Then all of them
All the Americans to meditate
I don't know why in these Eastern Bloc people, Bulgarians and Russians all this Romanians
how they have taken to Sahaja Yoga so much.
Of course there had the curse of communism on them maybe that they felt
that they have missed something in life, and went deep down into themselves.
And this is how it has been achieved by them but I must tell Indians to meditate.
Indians are of two very bad qualities one of which is groupism for example if they
they'll sit together. If there are kaishtas,
They will sit together
if their are baniyas
If that is not so
then by another name
this is the worst curse of my country
because once you start grouping
You can never see
and
This grouping
together can bring a lot of problems in this country. At the time of Christ, they had very
different type people – either were interested spirituality or not. Now we have
People here who are interested in Spirituality but still their one leg is
in the water, where age-old problems still exist.
And this is a ruin of our country – we cannot combine together!
We can't be friends with each other…
Of course not in Sahaja Yoga I must say it has been solved very well but if you see
Even at the time of Christ he had problems with his disciples, especially something happened
to Peter.
He is one who said that Satan will meet you because I think people fall into a group
of satanic forces, and he said that He removed the satanic devils from many people
And put them in their pigs. It's true there is a satanic force which
Is working very strongly
The more we develop security or spirituality
the more they will develop.
The satanic force is in a different form
In the West and
A different from in
But I would like to tell for them
To be careful how
Find out
The satanic forces
You may not be affected by that
Because you are realized souls
But you'll have to fight it,
You will have to fight.
For example racialism
Racialism is still
very powerful there
Very-very powerfull
And
and you've got to fight racialism
through marrying people who belong
other races
but I find difficult
To marry a black person
It's an impossible situation
If i try that
I don't know what happens.
Once we had such a marriage, and white lady, French lady was married to black man instead
of the French lady dominating this Black Man dominated her so i was quite surprised you
How could that be?
So the reason was, I think he was taking revenge maybe there is fight.
so first of all tremendous love and affection has to grow between people this color it's
skin deep. It has nothing to do with the love inside, it's so skin-deep! Thank God in our
country you can have a wife who will be very dark husband and she is fair or vice versa
but they never look at that from this angle I don't think that exists
in this country. But we have another kind, you see just the typical human problem is
that he discriminates through ego which I must say Christ has tried to fight your ego
He was born into a very humble family and he wasn't not white skinned man no? In
In your language he was brown, but in Indian language
He is black. When it comes to spirituality
you just see the enlightened one
You don't what colour they have on their skin
It's very superficial
But this Is One of The Enemies
Of Western Life
I think which must be conquered
Materialism is another one
But the worst of all, which is against Christ
Is immorality.
Immorality so much accepted in the West
All kinds of immoral behavior are accepted
Like they say that
These immoral people vote for somebody
He becomes a President Of America
Then it's alright, doesn't matter
All kinds of immoralities are allowed.
But that is absolutely against Christ,
absolutely!
People don't understand
That immorality will lead them
to a kingdom which I do not know what
call because it's even worse than animal Kingdom
and they're so immoral
They listen people like Freud
as if there no brains
They have no spirit to take note of such a man.
Only after Sahaja Yoga, model of Christ's life you can happen
Whatever is past is over and finished
Today now your are realized souls
And morality
Is Your strength
Forget about the Past
And I am sure you can get many more people under the banner of Sahaja Yoga if
You lead a very, very moral life. At that same time another
Very bad enemy we have is our anger
So they are proud to say
I'll now get angry. You know, I'm very angry."
They are not ashamed about it and they go on saying
that,"I am very angry", as if
is no wrong to say,
"'I'am very angry". Now this a,'I hate'.
Imagine any Indian language
If you use these words
It would be meaning I was committing sin
So all of the aggressiveness comes from anger
If somebody has to be angry, he should be angry with himself.
Best is –to get rid of anger you can pull your hair ,you can bite yourself and use
Your pillow To hit yourself . That maybe the best way
Of taking out your anger but see for what are You angry?
Sometimes it's absolutely useless, sometimes
has no meaning. Sometimes
is absolutely maddening and stupid
but as long you stop saying I am
very angry that the time
should know your falling down completely
so Christ didn't talk of all subtle things have been talking to
because that was left to Me.
Without realization how can you talk about subtler things?
You cannot!
Last time I told you the vibrations, what is it and why does It stand for?
And How will get this subtle energy which we call as Tanmatra of our light Tejas
of water, jala and pruthvi, agni.
But I didn't tell you about one very special one
which is in English language
we call it ether
but ether
Is the energy
Which is managed by another tan matra
We called it akash
It's specially today
Because its Christ
who has sacrificed his life to open our Agnya Chakra,
that we have reached the state of Akash.
Without him it would not had been possible
We can general communication
like you talk with people
say things
also use your fingers
express ourselves
hands
To communicate
To communicate vibrations you have to have vibrations
Otherwise, You cannot feel another one. But if you are at the Agya level means your mental
absolutely mental
Then Your Vibrations also
Are dwindling in The sense
You don't know what really they are saying.
you can' t judge your vibrations because these vibrations
Are mental,
They'll say mother we asked the vibrations
I said really?
But he didn''t have any vibration so how could ask the vibration
Very common thing
We asked a vibration
We found from the vibrations
It's not possible
Because you are just mental, now what Christ has done is to put
away from the mental level. That's most difficult
while I am surprised those who follow Christianity have
worst mental positions they're mentally absolutely there like
don't know how to call it, like fog of Delhi that
You can't cross.
That's what was broken, was Christ!
How much we should be obliged to Him
that He removed the greatest hurdle in human ascent
and one of them is
break this Agnya
This mental being within us
We read like mad
listen people like mad
We like those who give us
Feed for our mental being they are so mental
So argumentative think no end of their intelligence
That you have to just say all right namaskar. You can't fight there mentally
attitude that's why Christ
Is to be worshipped by people, Who Are so very mental and this mental?
Until nonsense has given such a sense of superiority to people, whatever we do what's wrong?
What is wrong.
They cannot correct themselves because unless and until you cross this limit
Of mental being
You can not see yourself
You cannot introspect, you can not see yourself.
We'll others the sahaja yogis are like this,
Sahajyoga is that all kinds of things
but if I don't
See your self because
The whole thing is meant
This mental attitude
Should be completely
Curved through
Help
Our Lord Jesus Christ
But he's also mental
In your brains Christ is also mental now, what to do?
The one who broke the mental attitude
he's all so mental. You have made him into mental
like a statue of stone
So firstly we've got
tell ourselves don't think
four times and then you can rise above
And this very important
In meditation you have to go beyond the mind, and thanks
Christ that He's sitting at Agnya to finish off this
nonsense of mental being.
I think people should stop reading also perhaps maybe
Even my lecture becomes mental what do?
Everything goes into their head becomes mental somehow
And then they ask Me questions
Mother, did you say this way? What is the… I said it to make You thoughtless. Just
To stun You!
…I didn't Say This to sit down and analyze
And do no-no
...I Said This that You become absolutely shocked
understand. So, the best thing for all of you is to become thoughtless – that's
The Blessing Of Christ! That what He worked it out and I'm sure if You work
It Out then don't pay attention To others
Don' react just don''t react everything they will see they'll
What is the need?
what are you going to do with that reaction.
This reaction creates nothing but ripple of thoughts in your mind, I have told hundreds
times and now we will become absolutely thoughtless after this puja if it happens i think we
have achieved a lot. That's the biggest blessing that Christ has given you, which
should really enjoy! Then only this Akash Tattva in your will work and how it works? Through
Your attention – It worked with Me as You know… With My attention I've worked out
many things. How? Just my attention has become thoughtless, just thoughtless! It goes wherever
it works but if you put your attention for thoughts all the time – thinking then
doesn't do what is supposed to be done. Attention works marvellously when you are
spotless, otherwise it doesn't.
So is has to rise from your own self then form others through the higher level of humanity
where you are in communication with a sky which we can call as the Tanmatra or essential
or the essence of ether.
With Ether you can have television,
and it's a miracle otherwise
but with this Thanatara sitting down here
You Can do The job
It works
Just attention Works I know that
We also Know very well
They don't Have to ask Me To put the Attention
You just put the attention and it will work.
It's a very important thing that you have got to do, I think
That is first things once you've had no problem
But we start manifesting from Earth element
Then from Agni element
then from Jale element
And then we come to Tejas, where the face starts shining.
But lastly you get this thoughtless awareness by which our attention
is absolutely free to do some special work
but if your all time thinking
that for these attention it's so busy
very busy. You don't have to ask Me then, Mother please pay attention you can pay attention
and work it out." In this attention we do not feel what you got ,what your are standing
or wearing . What others doing no? You all one with yourself
And it's a life full of humor, so much humor.
So much joy and happiness that you don't care for anything like normally people do
As it is now Sahaja Yoga has worked in many countries I am very proud to be here.
And now it is also going to African countries,
It's a very great satisfaction for them.
and you all can do that
You will work out
Only thing become thoughtlessly aware
as the blessing of Christ
If this works
then we'll be absolutely enjoying ourselves
May God bless you
The thing is that the English language has been stuck on us for 300 years.
I never learnt English,
Never!
There was a small book in school also
and nobody teaches English at medical college
My father used to say this is such an easy language
with so few words
there's no need of learning
And he put me into Marathi School
that learn Marathi and Sansthut, so I never learned Sansthit also.
And Hindi is never learnt either
no question arises
didn't even learn it in school or college
nowhere did I learn Hindi language
but there's one good thing within me
let Me tell you
when i speak in Hindi language then only Hindi can be spoken
if i talk in Marathi then only Marathi can be spoken
This language is speaking in a different way, that language is speaking differently, that language is speaking differently.
Now no one will believe
That I have not learnt Hindi language at all
But the interest of reading
The interest to read good books
From this only Hindi language has come
In the beginning my language was very
Disgusted with Sanskrit
Very much
Because Maharashtrians speak like that
Hindi bhaasha bolenge, usme aade se zyada to Sanskrit shab
and bache khuche Marathi shapt. Samje na?
To ye halat hain. Humne jo ispe samjhaya ho ye
ki bhasha ka bi ek vardhan hota
jaise sangeet ka hota hai, kala ka hota hai
aise hi bhasha ka bardhan hota hai
Hindi people can speak a lot of languages, but Hindi people cannot learn any other language.
The reason for this is that, like the British, they are not able to learn any other language
and if they will learn then it's absolutely impossible
This is why everyone knows English only
That is why they don't know another language
Now the condition of those who speak Hindi is such
I would never say that you should learn Marathi, because the Marathi language is very difficult.
Very difficult!
Only a Marathi can understand it
and there's so much discrimination in it
There are so many jokes
There isn't even this much filthiness
Not even this much dirt
But such a language is prevalent
Such an abundance
And then for easy people, the Marathi language
like no other language
Itne sadhu santon se sab likha, so Marathi baasha.
Aur kare ek maar aapko marathi aa gayi to koise bhi baasha aa sakte hain
isme koi shukhe hain.
Par marathi log aur koi baasha nahi shikhe hain.
Bade khattar hota hai.
Kisi ko main ne kaha ki yeh Hindi kitab padho
To thodi pargaan chhor dey
Main ne kaha kiyaun?
Shri ghane hain.
Sab gandgi dikhee huye hain.
Mereko nae sunaya.
Because such pure language and such pure thoughts are there in Marathis.
After reading, after you read the Gita,
if something is written on the road,
you don't understand it.
So some of your people may learn that Marathi is good
but it's a very difficult language
And there are many differences between languages
Today I am telling because
Hindi may bol na prata hai, kyunki aap to Marathi bhaasha jaante nahi.
Par Poonamay mein Marathi mein bol kiye aur Mumbai main vi Indim bolna prata hai.
Gar koi seekhna chahe toh marathi bhaasha seekhi, ye seekhne wali bhashan and itni
kamal ki hai ki humare namdeyan jo badhe baari yahan ke bahut badhe sant ho gaya
Purnanak saheb ne bulaya, aur unse kaha ki tum Punjabi sikho
Aur punjabhi me tum dikho
Itni badi kitap likhiyon, punjbi mein
Aur mujhe panja baashaag mein jab Punjaba re
Gar aapko Marathi baasha agay
To siway Tamil ke aap sab bahasaen sikh sakte
Aur Tamilke be kuch shubh sikh sakte hain sahi
We have, you will be surprised, fourteen official languages in this country.
Directly, which should be said in the Bhrubhasa
In Pratyaksha, in Hindi
In Pratyaksh
That has been done in Marathi language
Here a very good Ramadevi was a wise woman
She had the Bible's speech
Whatever was there, whatever was the language of the Bible
that was in Marathi language
and the words in it
like John
John to Yohan, Matthews to Matthei.
So I read the Bible in Marathi
that's why many times my things get messed up
and it was clearly written
they have kept so much purity of it
And therein she wrote
when he went for marriage
vaha par paani se draksha saav banaya.
Badi tatva ki baat hai, Marathi mein likhiye.
Dushri visheshta maine dekhe hain
kya Isa Masih ke bachpan ke baare me
uski bali avastha ke liye
Koi angrezi main maine kavita nahi padhe hain
I don't know
Have you ever heard a poetry piece about the description of Christ's childhood?
I've never heard one, but in Marathi we have many.
Abhi kali eno ne gaya badia
Bala vadana tava bhagunik rista
Chote bache ka mu dekha rahe hua
After seeing your face, your child-like… child's face – Balavadam.
All My fears run away."
So this part is missing in the western languages I think that
The childhood themes are not there
We have about Krishna
About Rama
When they were children
How They used to walk
how they used to talk,
How there is put their finger in the mouth.
Every little thing is described so beautifully about children
and that's why I think Indians cannot
Think of kidding them at all
It´s an impossible situation
Even Hindi language
In Marathi language
We have such beautiful descriptions
Of this incarnation as Children
Then third thing
Kishri baat, jo surprising hai ki sara romance inka shaadi se pehle hiye.
Shaadi ke baad koi romance hain nahi?
Third thing is that there's no romance described after marriage or before marriage
– it' the other way round of Indian languages
All the romances come when you are married
Very sweet things
I was surprised, I asked somebody to find out one English book where they have described
the romance of a married couple.
No!
Finished?
All their romances over once your marriage is finished then what do you do ? You quarrel
,you fight .You go court and take divorce that description it's not there or
So we read the translation of the Bible in Marathi
and what is written there
was very deep.
The English language changed its sound, I think
And even about Isa Masih
which is a sacred
very spiritual
description of the sound
in the Marathi Bible
it's neither in Hindi
and neither in English.
Third thing, Marathi people are very self-righteous
like the people of Mewar in Rajasthan
they're very self-righteous
They won't learn anything from the English
If you teach English then he'll say
Raudhya! Raudhya!
I've seen many like yours
But North I saw that
a lot of Englishmen
wear suit boots
tie, shoes
Marathis wear dhoti, educated people also wear dhoti.
You have seen Tilak, he has become a leader of his country
Ranade and Agarkar are here too
They didn't wear any suit or tie-wire
If they were government servants then they would do it
But in India there is no such thing
To do government job is also a very good thing, I think.
Maharaj you know that
Many times it's written
Why don't we do government jobs?
Then some names are given
Look they did the government job so what's wrong with them
But there isn' t any importance of government jobs
And our father says
that first of all, doing a job is an impossible thing.
Keep your profession
and if you want to do more government jobs than this then it's impossible
the character of human beings gets destroyed
so I have seen many such people
If someone comes in IAS
Then its done
his value goes up there
30 lakhs, 35 lakhs
This is a very big difference and that's why in the beginning, I used to think about what they would understand
But it was really surprising
That there are so many officers in Delhi
I don't believe this
With whose blessings did all of these happen?
They were the number one scoundrel among the British
What happened with them?
How could things change?
I feel that Shri Ram and Shri Krishna, wherever they are in the world, their blessings are there.
There is nothing else to say
because a place like Lucknow where you can eat, drink or enjoy
And throw away all your heart
I was shocked by what people would talk about
Everyone's relationship is just as it is
Now when i went from Maharashtra, i didn't understand anything
Bhabhi hai toh uska mazaak hain saath toh, Nanda hai toh uskha mazaaq hain saath.
Meri khopdi mein nahi jata tha.
Aur ab main dekhti hoon ki Sri Ram aur Shri Krishna ka aashirvaat
aur Kabir ki vaani, Nanak Saheb ka aashirvaat
Arre ye Punjabi log mai Punjab me parthiti
Toh main sochte thi ye Punjabi inki toh kabhi
Khopdi mein sahjyog jaayega hi nahi
How did they get it?
There was no one giving a lecture, nothing.
What will happen now?
Now I have worked very hard in Maharashtra
Oh my God!
I went to every village and every place
and worked very hard
But this is not the case only in Maharashtra
The matter of North India
that is not there in Maharashtra
It's surprising
that everything is useless.
On the contrary, they started following me.
So I came to know
that here Guru Gantal is very much
a Guru of every person
Guru, Guru, there are many Gurus in this house
